---
title: pycharm
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
source("~/github/how2/_knitr_config.R")
```

*********************************************************************

## installation 

```sh
brew cask install pycharm-ce
```

*********************************************************************

## interpreter 

- `PyCharm >`  
- `Preferences >`  
- `Project: [my project] >`  
- `Project Interpreter >`  
- `Project Interpreter... >`  
- `[Settings wheel] >`  
- `Add... >`  

### conda env

- `Conda Environment >`  
- `Existing Environment >`  
- `Interpreter`  

*********************************************************************

## shortcuts

- `PyCharm >`  
- `Preferences >`  
- `Appearances & Behaviour >`  
- `Keymap`  


shortcut  | action
------------- | -------------
CTRL + R | source script
